sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented for this RPG/business simulation title

special_mechanics.name: Fleet Management
special_mechanics.description: Player manages a seagoing fleet rather than direct character movement; game is primarily turn-based seafaring simulation

special_mechanics.name: Sea Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Ship movement across world map; not traditional platformer physics

tier_notes: This is a business simulation/strategy RPG, not a platformer or action game. Player controls a ship captain managing fleets, trades, and exploration rather than direct character movement. Traditional platformer physics parameters (jump, gravity, acceleration) are not applicable to this game genre. Movement mechanics are simulated through menu-based navigation and turn-based sea travel.
